mission.title: podman-container-tools: Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in M1 Mac
mission.description: Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in M1 Mac. This issue affects 18+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for error: `0 (30 days)`

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
**Description**

In a M1 Mac, Downloaded the VM via `podman machine init` and then when trying to start it via `podman machine start` I get thew following error: 
```
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...

steps.title: Apply the fix for Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in M1 Mac
steps.description:
In case it's of any use, I'm finding that the max memory I'm able to set on a machine is `3072`, otherwise I see the `connection refused` error.

✔️ The following works:
```
podman machine init # default memory is 2048
podman machine start
```

```
podman machine init -m 3072
podman machine
```yaml
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Error: dial unix /var/folders/kk/vvrx0k6x2b54wnnhc0zt6rv00000gr/T/podman/podman-machine-default_ready.sock: connect: connection refused
```

steps.title: Confirm Cannot start machine with podman version 4.1.0 in… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that `0 (30 days)` no longer appears.

resolution.summary: In case it's of any use, I'm finding that the max memory I'm able to set on a machine is `3072`, otherwise I see the `connection refused` error.
